word: H2636 - חַסְפַּס - chaçpaç - khas-pas' - Round thing

sections.paragraph:
Original: חספּס

Transliteration: chaspas

Phonetic: khas-pas'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Pual) to peel, flake off (only in the participle)
    1. scale-like, flake-like, scaled-off

Origin: reduplicated from an unused root meaning apparently to peel

TWOT entry: 704

Part(s) of speech: Verb
